reasoning: The Baseline algorithm only marks the last character as 1, resulting in the lowest F1 scores (0.29, 0.40, 0.50) across all three sentences.
Pavan's algorithm marks all final consonants as 1, resulting in medium F1 scores (0.42, 0.36, 0.60) due to over-segmentation.
Arun's algorithm uses the most sophisticated pattern matching (FC preceded by vowel or followed by IC+V), resulting in the highest F1 scores (0.60, 0.67, 1.00).
